# Ingantt Help — Português

> Documentation for Ingantt, a project scheduling application.

## Primeiros Passos

- [Visão Geral](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/getting-started/overview/index.md)
- [Primeiros Passos](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/getting-started/getting-started/index.md)
- [Criar com IA](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/getting-started/create-with-ai/index.md)
- [Importar e Exportar](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/getting-started/import-export/index.md)

## Configurando Seu Projeto

- [Propriedades do Projeto](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/setting-up-project/project/index.md)
- [Calendários](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/setting-up-project/calendars/index.md)

## Construindo um Cronograma

- [Tarefas](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/building-schedule/tasks/index.md)
- [Propriedades da Tarefa](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/building-schedule/task-properties/index.md)
- [Dependências](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/building-schedule/dependencies/index.md)
- [Restrições](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/building-schedule/constraints/index.md)
- [Recursos](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/building-schedule/resources/index.md)
- [Atribuições](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/building-schedule/assignments/index.md)

## Análise e Ajustes

- [Caminho Crítico](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/adjusting-schedule/critical-path/index.md)
- [Nivelamento de Recursos](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/adjusting-schedule/leveling/index.md)
- [Campos Personalizados](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/adjusting-schedule/custom-fields/index.md)

## Planejamento de Custos

- [Entendendo os Custos](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/planning-costs/planning-costs/index.md)
- [Configurando Custos](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/planning-costs/setting-up-costs/index.md)

## Acompanhamento do Progresso

- [Linhas de Base](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/tracking/baselines/index.md)
- [Acompanhamento do Progresso](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/tracking/progress/index.md)

- [Gráfico de Gantt](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/views/gantt/index.md)

- [Visualizações de Recursos](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/views/resource-views/index.md)

- [Adicionando e Selecionando](https://help.ingantt.com/pt/ui/ui/index.md)
